text: I reached out last week about a billing issue, and I still haven’t heard back. It’s frustrating!
i can't log in to my account, my pwd isnt working

I seem to have encountered a strange issue where my system doesn't recognize the latest software update, although it was supposed to be installed automatically. I've tried restarting multiple times, but I can't locate the update in my settings. Additionally, could you let me know if there's an impact on my subscription features based on this update?

Hi there! I'm really frustrated because the app keeps crashing whenever I try to upload a photo. I just can't seem to get it to work properly, and it's super annoying! Also, I was hoping to know if there are any updates coming soon that might fix this issue.
Could you please clarify the exact procedure for updating my billing information, particularly in cases where the account is under a different name than the one on the payment method?
My keyboard isn't working in the app, but only sometimes. Can you help?

I heard you might have a special program for new users, but I can't seem to find any info on it. Can you help me understand how it works? I'm really excited to get started and would love to know more!
Hello, I’m curious if there’s a way to reset my password using just my phone number? Also, I have a cat that likes to sit on my keyboard while I work.

I recently noticed that my subscription was automatically renewed even though I explicitly canceled it last month. This has caused quite a bit of inconvenience for me, as I had made plans based on the assumption that my cancellation would be processed. Can you please confirm the cancellation and issue a refund for the recent charge? I appreciate your attention to this matter as I navigate through the confusion it has caused.
hey, is there a way to get a discount for students? like how do i do it?
This item did not work as advertised. I also followed all the setup instructions, and I am really frustrated with how it turned out.
I would like to express my dissatisfaction with the recent service I received, as it did not meet my expectations. Additionally, I found the response time to be unacceptable.
I'm really upset because I can't log into my account! I reset my password but still no luck. Can someone please help me?
I’m really frustrated because the app keeps crashing every time I try to log in. It's been like this for days and I don’t know what to do anymore.
Hey, so I thought I had cancelled my subscription, but I just noticed I've been charged again. Can you help me out with getting my money back, like, even if it's a bit tricky? Thanks!
Hey, I got a pair of shoes that are too small for me. Can I get a refund instead of store credit? Thanks!
